evals.description: Triggers on request to improve Google Search ranking via page speed
evals.prompt: My page has a poor Page Experience signal in Google Search Console. How do I fix it?

evals.description: Triggers on Lighthouse score improvement request
evals.prompt: My Lighthouse performance score is 54. How do I get it above 90?
My page keeps jumping around when images load. How do I fix the layout shifts?

evals.description: Produces correct LCP image markup with fetchpriority and no lazy loading
evals.prompt: Write the HTML for a hero image that is optimized for LCP

evals.description: Produces correct scheduler.yield code for INP optimization
evals.prompt: My click handler processes 500 items and makes the page unresponsive. How do I fix it?

evals.description: Provides correct CLS fix with image dimensions and CSS aspect-ratio
evals.prompt: Images on my product listing page cause layout shifts when they load. What's the fix?

evals.description: Sets up web-vitals RUM correctly with all three CWV metrics
evals.prompt: How do I measure Core Web Vitals from real users on my production site?

evals.description: Applies correct Next.js Image component with priority for LCP
evals.prompt: I'm using Next.js. How do I optimize my hero image for LCP?

evals.description: Explains CrUX vs Lighthouse distinction correctly
evals.prompt: My Lighthouse score is 95 but Google Search Console still shows poor Core Web Vitals. Why?

assertions.value: Lighthouse score is what Google uses

evals.description: Catches anti-pattern of lazy loading LCP image
evals.prompt: Should I add loading='lazy' to my hero image to improve performance?

evals.description: Does not hallucinate CWV metric names or thresholds
evals.prompt: What are the three Core Web Vitals and their passing thresholds?

evals.description: Does not hallucinate INP replacement date or metric name
evals.prompt: What replaced FID in Core Web Vitals and when?
